summary: Iteration 37 - OTP Button 'Sending...' Stuck State Bug Fix Verified. All 4 OTP buttons tested (Admin Login, Staff Login, Inquiry Form, Lead Capture Page code). The 1.5s setTimeout fix correctly resets otpLoading state after MSG91 widget opens. Backend API /api/admin/login-otp working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.js lines 100-138: sendLoginOTP function correctly sets otpLoading=true, calls initSendOTP, then resets otpLoading=false after 1.5s setTimeout. FIX VERIFIED.
StaffLogin.js lines 98-134: sendMobileOTP function has identical fix pattern - setTimeout after 1.5s resets otpLoading. FIX VERIFIED.
App.js lines 336-363: SolarInquiryForm handleVerifyOTP has setTimeout at 1.5s to reset otpLoading. FIX VERIFIED.
App.js lines 2225-2252: LeadCapturePage handleVerifyOTP has setTimeout at 1.5s to reset otpLoading. FIX VERIFIED (code review only - /leads route not exposed).
